media_title: Where in the World is Carmen Sandiego?

characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.media_title: Where in the World is Carmen Sandiego?
characters.description: Excited Kids' Show Host: Downplayed; Greg was laid back, and a bit of a goofball, but he wasn't really "zany". Large Ham: He was usually more of a straight man to the hammier Rockapella guys, but he certainly had his moments. Phrase Catcher: "Greg, go away!" Black Boss Lady: A former trope image. Breakout Character: She was not in the original computer games, being created for the game show. She's now considered an iconic part of the franchise, second only to Carmen herself.

characters.name: ACME Crimenet

characters.name: VILE
characters.media_title: Where in the World is Carmen Sandiego?
characters.description: Malicious Misnaming: In one episode, she writes a letter to the Chief, addressing ACME Crimenet as "Slimenet." Orcus on His Throne: She masterminds all the thefts but doesn't do much in the show itself, preferring to work through her henchmen to avoid the cops. Surrounded by Idiots: Listen to herphone callsto her henchmen on the show. It's obvious that they're not the brightest people in the world.Lampshaded in some of the computer games as Carmen having a soft spot for those less talented than herself. Lampshaded in some of the computer games as Carmen having a soft spot for those less talented than herself. Troll: She occasionally does this to the Chief, mocking the Chief for not catching her or plantingspy bugsin the Chief's office.
